creator: m.r.sopacua@gmail.com
text:
OpenSSL 1.1.0c is marked as vulnerable to CVE-2016-2178. Nothing in that CVE suggests OpenSSL 1.1 tree ever was vulnerable as only OpenSSL 1.0.1h and lower is marked as such.

Yet, pkg audit reports:
openssl-devel-1.1.0c is vulnerable:
OpenSSL -- vulnerability in DSA signing
CVE: CVE-2016-2178
WWW: https://vuxml.FreeBSD.org/freebsd/6f0529e2-2e82-11e6-b2ec-b499baebfeaf.html

1 problem(s) in the installed packages found.
